title: Stray Cat Rock: Wild Jumbo
original_title: 野良猫ロック　ワイルドジャンボ
overview: Wild young people kidnap a wealthy woman and she becomes attracted to one of them. When she tells the man that she is the mistress of a religious leader, he and his posse make plans to rob her partner.
